scene_title: Robo Optimus em postura de instrucao
narrative_beat: Humanoide carmesim e prata dourada em fabrica Tesla

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Tesla Optimus-like humanoid robot two meters tall in dark crimson and golden silver with articulated finger hands open in instruction-receiving pose with visible mechanical shoulder and chest details in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the articulated fingers open in instruction-receiving pose
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated Tesla factory production line in background
props: Optimus-like robot in dark crimson and golden silver

composition.rule: zoom-in on torso and hands composition
composition.foreground: robot in vivid dark crimson gold

mood.emotion: the image of the beast walking and working

symbolism.primary: Optimus as the fulfillment of the speaking image
symbolism.secondary: articulated hands as capability for judgment and labor

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
